meaning: n.聚集的人群,出席者,产量
examples: Election officials predict they'll set a new turnout record for an off-year election in Washington state.
On the big night there was a massive turnout.
This year's festival attracted a record turnout.
In addition to disappointing box office turnout, the Redford-directed flick earned largely negative reviews.
With the presidential election bringing intense interest and states are reporting high early turnout.
